Localization.Description: Mass change of agent groups can indicate an attacker attempting to conceal their actions with the Aria Operations for Logs monitoring objects

EventDescriptions.EventDescription: User {subject.account.name} changed agent groups. {datafield1} groups are deleted in Aria Operations for Logs on host {event_src.host}
User {subject.account.name} changed agent groups. {datafield1} groups are deleted and {datafield2} groups are edited in Aria Operations for Logs on host {event_src.host}
User {subject.account.name} changed agent groups. {datafield2} groups are edited in Aria Operations for Logs on host {event_src.host}
